sprite

program.cpp

00001 #include "sprite/program.hpp"
00002 
00003 namespace sprite
00004 {
00005   Program::Program() : oper(), /*ctor_label(),*/ oper_label()
00006   {
00007     // Copy the built-in H functions to the operation table.
00008     oper.reserve(OP_END);
00009     std::copy(&builtin_h[0], &builtin_h[OP_END], std::back_inserter(oper));
00010 
00011     // Same for the labels.
00012     // ctor_label.reserve(C_END);
00013     // std::copy(
00014     //     &builtin_ctor[0], &builtin_ctor[C_END]
00015     //   , std::back_inserter(ctor_label)
00016     //   );
00017 
00018     oper_label.reserve(OP_END);
00019     std::copy(
00020         &builtin_oper[0], &builtin_oper[OP_END]
00021       , std::back_inserter(oper_label)
00022       );
00023   }
00024 
00025   shared_ptr<Module const> Program::import(std::string name)
00026   {
00027     // Only import if the named module was not previously imported.
00028     if(m_imported.count(name) == 0)
00029     {
00030       // Magic.  The name lookup needs to be generalized and eventually
00031       // trigger a dlopen, but for now we just look up the module name in a
00032       // hard-coded step.
00033 
00034       typedef shared_ptr<Module> module_ptr_type;
00035       tr1::function<module_ptr_type(Program &)> module_initializer;
00036       if(name == "List")
00037         { module_initializer = load_list; }
00038       else
00039         throw RuntimeError("Unknown module: " + name);
00040 
00041       assert(module_initializer);
00042 
00043       // Load the module into this program.
00044       module_ptr_type const module = module_initializer(*this);
00045       m_imported[name] = module;
00046       return module;
00047     }
00048     return m_imported[name];
00049   }
00050 
00051   size_t Program::insert_ctor(std::string const & name)
00052   {
00053     // TODO: find name collisions?
00054     ctor_label.push_back(name);
00055     return ctor_label.size() - 1;
00056   }
00057 
00058   size_t Program::insert_oper(std::string const & name, h_func_type h)
00059   {
00060     // TODO: find name collisions?
00061     assert(oper.size() == oper_label.size());
00062 
00063     oper.push_back(h);
00064     oper_label.push_back(name);
00065     return oper_label.size() - 1;
00066   }
00067 }
